environment_notes: DBus warnings were emitted in WSL and did not block page load.
Initial --use-gl=swiftshader attempt showed the renderer-blocked fallback; ANGLE SwiftShader rendered the Three.js scene and loaded local assets.

observed: local renderer status is visible as local renderer
player ship, station, asteroids, dock ring, station beacon, reticle, radar, objective, target label, and station label render in the first viewport
project-local ship, asteroid, station, and pirate texture requests were served by the local static server
local renderer status is visible as local renderer
ship, reticle, objective, resources, radar, station label, and target label remain visible in the narrow first viewport
no horizontal page scroll was required for the core cockpit surface
